channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: The Detective Is Already Dead game announced for Switch
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Published by TAITO.

TAITO has announced The Detective Is Already Dead, the first game based on Kadokawa Corporation MF Bunko J’s light novel. It will be available for Switch. A release date, genre, or official title has not been announced.

A The Detective Is Already Dead anime aired from July to September 2021. After five years, a second season is set to premiere in October.

Here is a synopsis of the anime, via Crunchyroll:

After thwarting a hijacking with beautiful, silver-haired detective Siesta, Kimihiko leads a life of globe-trotting and crime-solving—until Siesta dies. A year later, a new case will open old wounds as it threads murder, conspiracy, and his dead partner!



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/the-detective-is-already-dead-game-announced-for-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: My Hero Academia: United Survival announced for iOS, Android
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

Due out in 2026 worldwide.

KLabGames and gumi have officially announced My Hero Academia: United Survival, the free-to-play iOS and Android game first confirmed in 2022. It will launch in 2026 worldwide, excluding Mainland China.

Official Twitter accounts were also opened in both English and Japanese. Further information about the game will be communicated through these channels.

Watch the teaser trailer below.

Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/my-hero-academia-united-survival-announced-for-ios-android
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Genesis RPG Traysia coming to PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC on April 24
item.content:encoded:
Ratalaika Games and Shinyuden will release Telenet Japan-developed, 1992-released Genesis RPG Traysia for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 24, the companies announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Ratalaika Games and Shinyuden:

About

Dreaming of becoming a world-traveling adventurer, a young boy named Roy left his hometown. Having known neither travel nor battle, the boy’s adventure now begins.

After behind the hometown, he traveled through many mountains and forests. Roy finally arrived at a small county called Kingdom of Salon.

Traysia is a girl waiting for Roy to come back in their hometown, Johanna, a port town.

Traysia is a full-scale role-playing game made up of five scenarios, offering a definitive fantasy romance of love and adventure.

Key Features

  • Rewind/Turbo function: repeat something until you achieve perfection, or speed things up.
  • Save state function: save wherever you want to in the game, and restart from that exact point.
  • Screen filters: select from several filters to modify how the game looks (retro-style monitor, black-and-white, etc.).
  • Gallery: view images from the original game’s manual and box design.
  • Cheats function: activate cheats that will make your mission a lot easier (infinite lives, invulnerability, etc.).
  • Jukebox: listen to the 21 music tracks included in the game whenever you want.

This game is re-release of Traysia, which the first launched in 1992s for home consoles.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/genesis-rpg-traysia-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-ps4-xbox-one-switch-and-pc-on-april-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
